articles.title: 智利盐湖的锂矿争夺战：一场中美都不愿输掉的竞赛
articles.summary: 巴特利特：智利总统卡斯特承诺，将为全球最炙手可热的矿产开辟快速通道。卡斯特如今必须在美国与中国之间维持一场微妙的平衡。

articles.title: 拒绝AI焦虑：初创公司押注“情绪价值”慢赛道
articles.summary: 这些小而新的初创企业有一些共同点，比如创始人越来越年轻；更关注人类某些细微但重要的情感需求；小件产品价格约千元左右；多通过孵化平台成长；优先选择在海外发售产品等。

articles.title: Oil jumps 2% as Israel expands Lebanon offensive, rattling ceasefire hopes
articles.summary: Oil prices surged on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.

articles.title: A year of grief and waiting: What remains when a plane falls from the sky
articles.summary: A year after the Air India crash, a mother still speaks about her dead son in the present tense and a brother waits for answers.

articles.title: Why Britain's notoriously bad train wi-fi might soon be a thing of the past
articles.summary: How bad is the signal on our trains? We spoke to commuters to find out.

articles.title: 韩元和海力士背离：资金去哪了？
articles.summary: 周浩：韩国“强出口、强股市、弱货币”的组合，不仅打破了传统开放经济体的基本逻辑，也揭示了韩国经济结构与全球资本流动之间更深层的变化。

articles.title: Oil rises, U.S. stock futures flat as Wall Street looks to extend its winning streak
articles.summary: U.S. stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, as Wall Street looks to stretch the market’s record-setting rally into June.

articles.title: 特朗普在一天内连遭法律挫败
articles.summary: 美国联邦法官下令总统将自己的名字从肯尼迪中心移除，还叫停了旨在帮助其政治盟友的18亿美元“反武器化法律基金”。
